| FIRST DASH NO.   | NOM   | THREADS          | THREADS     | A         | D             | D            | D            | D            | (F)   | H         | R RAD     |             |
|------------------|-------|------------------|-------------|-----------|---------------|--------------|--------------|--------------|-------|-----------|-----------|-------------|
| FIRST DASH NO.   | NOM   | (MODIFIED)       | (MODIFIED)  | A         | BEFORE FINISH | AFTER FINISH | AFTER FINISH | AFTER FINISH | (F)   | H         | R RAD     | (S)         |
| FIRST DASH NO.   | NOM   | THREAD SIZE      | MAJOR MOD   | A         | ALUM COAT     | ALL          | ALUM COAT    | NONE         | (F)   | H         | R RAD     | CHAMFER     |
| FIRST DASH NO.   | NOM   | THREAD SIZE      | MAJOR MOD   | A         | MIN           | MAX          | MIN          | MIN          | (F)   | H         | R RAD     |             |
| 5                | 5/32  | .1640-32 UNJC-3A | .1595 .1565 | .322 .306 | .1621         | .1635        | .1625        | .1630        | .030  | .060 .055 | .025 .015 | 1/32" X 45° |
| 6                | 3/16  | .1900-32 UNJF-3A | .1840 .1810 | .377 .357 | .1881         | .1895        | .1885        | .1890        | .035  | .074 .064 | .025 .015 | 1/32" X 45° |
| 8                | 1/4   | .2500-28 UNJF-3A | .2440 .2410 | .440 .415 | .2481         | .2495        | .2485        | .2490        | .045  | .090 .080 | .025 .015 | 1/32" X 45° |
| 10               | 5/16  | .3125-24 UNJF-3A | .3060 .3020 | .505 .475 | .3106         | .3120        | .3110        | .3115        | .055  | .112 .102 | .030 .020 | 3/64" X 45° |

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

DIMENSIONS AND TOLERANCE PER ASME Y14.5-2018.

DIMENSIONS IN INCHES UNLESS OTHERWISE NOTED.

DIMENSIONS APPLY AFTER FINISH, AND BEFORE SOLID FILM LUBE AND CETYL ALCOHOL LUBE UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED. SURFACE TEXTURE PER ASME B46.1. HEAD TO SHANK FILLET, THREAD FLANKS, THREAD ROOT, SHANK ("D" DIAMETER) AND BEARING SURFACE OF HEAD, 32 MICROINCHES RA. OTHER SURFACES, 125 MICROINCHES RA.

## PIN, EDDIE BOLT   2, PROTRUDING TENSION HEAD, HEX OR SPLINE-LOK   SOCKET RECESS, 95 KSI MIN SHEAR, 6AL-4V TITANIUM R R

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

| HOWMET AEROSPACE PART STANDARD                                                                     |                                                                                                    | ELS420                                                                                             |
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| HOWMET FASTENING SYSTEMS CITY OF INDUSTRY OPERATIONS 135 N. UNRUH AVE., CITY OF INDUSTRY, CA 91744 | HOWMET FASTENING SYSTEMS CITY OF INDUSTRY OPERATIONS 135 N. UNRUH AVE., CITY OF INDUSTRY, CA 91744 | HOWMET FASTENING SYSTEMS CITY OF INDUSTRY OPERATIONS 135 N. UNRUH AVE., CITY OF INDUSTRY, CA 91744 |
| DATA CLASSIFICATION: GENERAL                                                                       | ECCN: EAR99                                                                                        | CAGE CODE: 1RC86                                                                                   |

TABLE I  -  DIMENSIONS &amp; MECHANICAL PROPERTIES (CONTINUED)

| FIRST DASH NO.   | NOM   | R SPLINE-LOK   | R SPLINE-LOK   | R SPLINE-LOK   | R SPLINE-LOK   | DOUBLE SHEAR STRENGTH LBF MIN   | TENSILE STRENGTH LBF MIN   |
|------------------|-------|----------------|----------------|----------------|----------------|---------------------------------|----------------------------|
| FIRST DASH NO.   | NOM   | ( Y)           | T MIN DEPTH    | J MAX DEPTH    | W HEX          | DOUBLE SHEAR STRENGTH LBF MIN   | TENSILE STRENGTH LBF MIN   |
| 5                | 5/32  | .100           | .075           | .140           | .0806 .0791    | 4,010                           | 2,180                      |
| 6                | 3/16  | .120           | .075           | .140           | .0806 .0791    | 5,380                           | 3,180                      |
| 8                | 1/4   | .160           | .090           | .160           | .0967 .0947    | 9,300                           | 5,820                      |
| 10               | 5/16  | .189           | .125           | .210           | .1295 .1270    | 14,600                          | 9,200                      |
| 12               | 3/8   | .242           | .120           | .205           | .1617 .1582    | 21,000                          | 14,000                     |

PROCUREMENT SPECIFICATION:

EBS2202.

MATERIAL:

6AL-4V TITANIUM ALLOY PER AMS4928 OR AMS4967.

HEAT TREAT:

95,000 PSI SHEAR MINIMUM.

FINISH:

NC =     NO FINISH, AND CETYL ALCOHOL LUBE PER AS87132.

NF =     DRY FILM LUBE PER AS5272, TYPE I (HEAD &amp; SHANK ONLY, OVERSPRAY PERMITTED) AND CETYL ALCOHOL LUBE PER AS87132.

NN =    NO FINISH AND NO LUBE.

JC  =    ALUMINUM COATING PER PS103 ON HEAD AND SHANK ONLY, CETYL ALCOHOL LUBE PER AS87132.  7

## PART CODE &amp; EXAMPLE:

## GENERAL NOTES:

- BLENDED RADIUS TRANSITION PERMITS USE IN INTERFERENCE FIT APPLICATION. 1
- FLUTE LOCATION ("K" DIMENSION) AND GEOMETRY ARE INSPECTED PER AFS SPECIFICATION E106. 2
- THREADS MUST ACCEPT A AS8879 "GO" RING GAGE TO ASSURE FREE RUNNING NUT CAPABILITY.  AS8879 LIMITS DO NOT 3 APPLY TO THREADS IN THE FLUTED PORTION OF THE THREAD. THE MINOR AND PITCH MAY BE UP TO .004 BELOW AS8879 MINIMUM VALUES AND MAJOR MAY BE UP TO .002 BELOW SHEET 1 VALUES FOR A DISTANCE EQUAL TO THE FLUTE LENGTH PLUS 1.5P MAX.
- SEE TABLE III. 4
- PINS MUST BE PACKAGED OR REPACKAGED IN CLEAR SEALED BAGS. EACH BAG MUST BE MARKED WITH PURCHASER'S AND 5. MANUFACTURER'S COMPLETE PART NUMBER, MANUFACTURER'S LOT NUMBER, MANUFACTURER'S OR DISTRIBUTOR'S NAME, AND THE PACK DATE.
- PARTS WITH A MANUFACTURE DATE ON OR AFTER APRIL 7, 2011, MUST HAVE THE SPINE-LOK    RECESS PETALS REMOVED IN 6. ACCORDANCE WITH EBS2202. THE REQUIREMENTS OF EBS2202 ARE NOT APPLICABLE TO PARTS WITH A MANUFACTURE DATE PRIOR TO APRIL 7, 2011; THESE PARTS ARE ACCEPTABLE FOR USEUNTIL INVENTORIES ARE DEPLETED.
- ALUMINUM COAT TO BE APPLIED TO HEAD AND SHANK ONLY.  OVERSPRAY IS ALLOWED IN THE THREAD RUNOUT AREA FOR 7 A MAXIMUM DISTANCE OF .030 FROM THE END OF THE GRIP.
- RUNOUT MEASURED WHEN HELD ON THE PITCH OF THE COMPLETE THREADS NEAREST THE SHANK AND CHECKED ON D 8 WITHIN ONE DIAMETER OF THE THREAD RUNOUT.
